series_metadata.series_description: Files contains information on reports of closure and corrective action file documents that include, but are not limited to the following forms: COM5217, COM 5232, COM 5233, COM 5234, COM 5235, COM 5236, COM 5237, COM 5238, COM 5239, COM 5240, COM 5241, COM 5242, COM 5243, COM 5244, COM 5245, COM 5246, COM 5251.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain original in office permanently or until the file is converted into a machine readable format, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records permanently. ; Paper: Retain closure and corrective action files in the operating area until files are assigned a No Further Action statuts ("NFA"). Upon the file being assigned a NFA status, the file will be converted into a machine readable format. After machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy records., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
